title: MyCR 全量评审报告 2026-06-26 10:08

repo_info.note: 目标 checkout 保持脏工作区不变；本轮只通过 GitHub API 和 MyCR 临时 detached worktree 读取。

overview: 本轮执行全量 MyCR 扫描：初始 open PR 38 个，终审 open PR 34 个；完成 4 个外部 PR 的 xhigh 复核、LGTM approve 与 match-head squash merge；新增 5 条 inline review comment；没有自审 WineChord 自己的 PR。最终没有剩余“main base、非 draft、CI 全绿、无线程、非 changes-requested”的可合入外部 PR。

复核并合入 #2008/#2007；#2007 等 GitHub mergeability 从 UNKNOWN 刷新为 MERGEABLE 后 match-head merge。
对 #2022/#2021/#2000/#1996/#1980 发出新的 inline comments；确认 #2020 仍被既有 CHANGES_REQUESTED 阻塞。
执行最终 open PR audit：#2024 仍 pending，历史 blockers/CI failures/drafts/conflicts 均未满足合入 gate。

approved.title: fix: Langfuse missing token usage data for streaming responses
approved.author: shanghai-Jerry
approved.modules: model/openai -> Langfuse usage conversion and tests
approved.technical_background: Langfuse integration relies on model usage being carried into response metadata. Some OpenAI-compatible providers report only total_tokens, and previous code paths could drop usage when prompt/completion fields were absent.
approved.problem: Earlier review asked for consistent streaming and non-streaming handling of total-only usage.
approved.approach: Current head adds the same TotalTokens-based presence check to streaming and non-streaming response creation, with focused regression tests for both helpers.
approved.design_assessment: The fix is narrow and preserves existing behavior for complete usage payloads while accepting provider payloads that only expose total token count.
approved.change_inventory: Updated response usage extraction and added conditional usage tests for final streaming response and completion conversion.
approved.behavior_impact: Langfuse now receives token usage for total-only OpenAI-compatible responses instead of missing usage in one path.
approved.risk: Low after green CI and no live review threads.
approved.ci_state: 162 checks pass; no unresolved review thread at merge time.
approved.outcome: xhigh 子审无发现；主线程复核 diff、threads、checks 后以 `LGTM` approve，并用 `--match-head-commit 26260123416cb88fb373e5c01ba25bb54144ae67` squash merge。

approved.title: fix: Anthropic streaming JSON parse error on tool-use blocks with non…
approved.author: shanghai-Jerry
approved.technical_background: Anthropic-compatible streaming proxies can emit malformed, partial, or literal null tool-use input while the accumulator later serializes content blocks.
approved.problem: Prior WineChord thread noted that `json.Valid("null")` is true, so a stream that starts with `input:null` and never sends `input_json_delta` could leave tool arguments as JSON null.
approved.approach: `ensureValidToolInput` now normalizes empty, partial, invalid, and literal `null` tool_use input to `{}` before refreshing raw JSON, and tests cover the null case.
approved.design_assessment: The repair is scoped to `tool_use`, so it avoids masking malformed text blocks while protecting tool-call argument serialization.
approved.change_inventory: Added tool_use input guard and boundary tests for nil/empty/partial/null valid JSON inputs.
approved.behavior_impact: Streaming Anthropic-compatible tool calls no longer fail or return null arguments when proxy input is incomplete.
approved.risk: Low; subagent also ran local isolated `go test ./... -count=1` in `model/anthropic` successfully.
approved.ci_state: 162 checks pass; prior null thread was verified fixed and resolved before merge.
approved.outcome: 旧 thread 已确认修复并 resolve；随后 `LGTM` approve，按 head `c17231f12d13a489118f83fb4bb7f5d5f36b74f4` squash merge。

approved.title: agent/extension/todoenforcer: preserve caller streaming mode
approved.author: bytethm
approved.technical_background: todoenforcer previously disabled streaming while open todo items existed so final compliance decisions happened before clients saw partial text.
approved.problem: This PR intentionally changes the product contract: enforcement should preserve caller streaming mode while still preventing premature final responses from being accepted or persisted.
approved.approach: Removed `GenerationConfig.Stream=false` override, updated tests to assert streaming is preserved, and documented that unfinished attempt text may reach clients while final acceptance is still blocked.
approved.design_assessment: The behavior is explicit in code, tests, and docs. The remaining risk is UX-level rather than correctness: clients may see interim text, but it is not terminal assistant history.
approved.change_inventory: Updated beforeModel behavior, renamed streaming test, and mirrored docs in English/Chinese.
approved.behavior_impact: Callers keep their streaming preference; todo enforcement continues by turning premature final response into a continuation signal.
approved.risk: Low to medium; semantics are deliberate and documented.
approved.outcome: 主线程与 xhigh 子审均无阻断发现；`LGTM` approve 后按 head `053fe7bc057db9def821212c8abc013f97f70abf` squash merge。

approved.title: codeexecutor: add tool code orchestration
approved.author: bytethm
approved.technical_background: CodeAct lets generated Python orchestrate a narrow set of host tools, which is useful for loops and data transformation across dependent tools but requires a strict capability boundary.
approved.problem: The PR adds a new orchestration surface; the main review risk is whether guest code can bypass host tool allowlists or leak host capabilities.
approved.approach: New Gateway only registers explicit `tool.CallableTool`s, validates input/output JSON schema, rejects external schema refs, and routes guest calls through a stdio protocol. LocalRunner is documented as development-only unless already sandboxed.
approved.design_assessment: The host-side boundary is clear: guest code receives `call_tool` only, host tools stay allowlisted, and Go-side schema validation happens on both directions. Local execution still depends on caller-provided sandboxing, which is documented.
approved.change_inventory: Added codeact runtime/protocol/gateway tests, toolcode wrapper, docs, and runnable example.
approved.behavior_impact: Applications can expose an `execute_tool_code` tool for controlled Python glue code over a separate managed tool registry.
approved.risk: Medium by feature nature, but no concrete correctness/security blocker found in this diff.
approved.ci_state: 162 checks pass; no unresolved review threads. GitHub mergeability was briefly UNKNOWN, then refreshed to MERGEABLE before merge.
approved.outcome: 主线程用临时 detached worktree 阅读最终代码；xhigh 子审无发现；`LGTM` approve 后按 head `5ef868ac3519ed12910eab51d1af61c734909ba1` squash merge。

commented.title: session/mysql: skip schema DDL for pre-existing tables on init
commented.author: hyprh
commented.technical_background: MySQL session init now skips all DDL when a table already exists, so runtime accounts without INDEX privilege can start against operator-provisioned schemas.
commented.problem: The skip path also covers a table left behind by a previous failed first-time bootstrap, where CREATE TABLE succeeded but UNIQUE index creation failed.
commented.approach: 本轮发 inline comment，要求区分 operator-provisioned 完整表和 init 半成品表，或者对 init 创建过的表缺失 UNIQUE index 直接失败。
commented.design_assessment: 跳过 live-table DDL 的方向合理，但不能让缺失唯一约束的 session/state 表继续服务。
commented.behavior_impact: 当前实现可能让服务在缺少唯一索引时启动，导致重复 active session/state rows。
commented.risk: High for correctness when bootstrap partially fails.
commented.ci_state: 160 checks pass; blocked by new review finding.
commented.outcome: xhigh 子审发现半成品表问题；主线程核对注释和 line 559 后发 inline comment，未 approve。

inline_comments.body:
Please do not treat every existing table as operator-provisioned. If a previous bootstrap created the table and then failed while creating a UNIQUE index, the next startup takes this skip path, `verifySchema` only logs the missing index, and the service can run without the uniqueness constraints that session/state writes rely on. Please track/retry incomplete bootstrap tables or make missing UNIQUE indexes fatal for tables created by init.

<details><summary>中文</summary>
这里把“运维预置的完整表”和“上次 init 建表成功但建唯一索引失败留下的半成品表”混在一起了。后者下次启动会跳过索引 DDL，而唯一索引缺失只打 ERROR 日志不阻止启动，可能让 session/app/user state 在缺少唯一约束时继续写入。请让 init 能识别并重试/阻断这种未完成的 bootstrap 状态，或者对 init 创建过的表缺少 UNIQUE index 直接失败。
</details>

commented.title: build(deps): update vulnerable go dependencies
commented.author: Rememorio
commented.modules: Go module dependency updates / OpenTelemetry stack
commented.technical_background: The PR updates many vulnerable/transitive dependencies across the multi-module tree. OpenTelemetry packages are versioned as a release train and should stay aligned within a module.
commented.problem: Several modules moved `otel`, `otel/metric`, or `otel/trace` to v1.41.0 while leaving `otel/sdk` or `otel/sdk/metric` at v1.40.0; session/clickhouse has the same pattern at v1.35.0 vs v1.34.0.
commented.approach: 本轮发总括 inline comment，要求复用 runner/bestofn 已采用的对齐方式，把 SDK 模块同步到相同 release train。
commented.design_assessment: 安全依赖更新本身方向正确，但混用 OTel release train 会留下兼容性漂移风险。
commented.behavior_impact: 构建虽然通过，但遥测 API/SDK 可能因为版本族不一致产生运行时或未来升级风险。
commented.ci_state: 162 checks pass; blocked by dependency consistency finding.
commented.outcome: xhigh 子审发现版本族漂移；主线程抽查 12 个 go.mod，确认 runner/bestofn 已修而其他模块未修后发 inline comment。

inline_comments.body:
Please bump the OTel SDK modules to `v1.41.0` wherever this PR moves the surrounding `go.opentelemetry.io/otel`, `otel/metric`, or `otel/trace` modules to `v1.41.0`. This file still leaves `otel/sdk` on `v1.40.0`, and the same mismatch remains in `examples/go.mod`, `examples/google/go.mod`, `examples/knowledge/go.mod`, `examples/provider/go.mod`, `examples/tailor/go.mod`, `model/provider/go.mod`, `openclaw/go.mod`, `server/evaluation/go.mod`, and `server/promptiter/go.mod`. `runner/bestofn` already fixed the same drift by moving SDK to `v1.41.0`; please apply that consistently. Also align `session/clickhouse/go.mod` by moving `otel/sdk` from `v1.34.0` to the `v1.35.0` release train used by its OTel API modules.

<details><summary>中文</summary>
这些模块本次把 OTel API/metric/trace 升到了 `v1.41.0`，但 SDK 仍停在 `v1.40.0`；`runner/bestofn` 已经按同类问题修到 `v1.41.0`，这里也需要同步，否则依赖更新后仍残留 OpenTelemetry 版本族不一致。另一个同类点是 `session/clickhouse/go.mod`：API/metric/trace 是 `v1.35.0`，SDK 仍是 `v1.34.0`，也需要对齐。
</details>

commented.title: docs: clarify summary sync behavior
commented.author: Rememorio
commented.technical_background: Session summary async worker can enqueue background work, but implementation still has fallback paths that perform synchronous summary creation when async worker or queue is unavailable.
commented.problem: Updated docs overstate two guarantees: non-blocking behavior and duplicate-prevention semantics.
commented.approach: 本轮发 inline comment，要求把 async summary 的“不阻塞”和“避免重复昂贵摘要”改成带条件的说明，并同步中文文档。
commented.design_assessment: 文档方向已比旧版本清晰，但不能比实现提供更强保证。
commented.behavior_impact: 误导用户对 summary worker 的延迟和多实例/多进程去重能力产生错误预期。
commented.ci_state: 162 checks pass; blocked by docs correctness finding.
commented.outcome: xhigh 子审发现过度承诺；主线程核对 `EnqueueSummaryJob` fallback 和 session/filterKey 进程内串行化后发 inline comment。

inline_comments.body:
This overstates both guarantees: `EnqueueSummaryJob` can still fall back to synchronous summary creation when the worker or queue is unavailable, and the session/filterKey serialization is process-local rather than a cross-instance guarantee. Please qualify the non-blocking and duplicate-prevention wording here and mirror the same caveat in the zh doc.

<details><summary>中文</summary>
这里把两个保证说得过强了：当 async worker 或队列不可用时，`EnqueueSummaryJob` 仍可能 fallback 到同步摘要创建；而 session/filterKey 串行化也是进程内保证，不是跨实例保证。请把“不会阻塞输出”和“不会重复昂贵摘要”的表述改成带条件的说明，并同步中文文档。
</details>

commented.title: fix: DeepSeek cached_tokens always 0 due to missing prompt_cache_hit_…
commented.author: shanghai-Jerry
commented.technical_background: DeepSeek reports prompt cache hits via top-level `prompt_cache_hit_tokens`; the PR maps that into `PromptTokensDetails.CachedTokens`.
commented.problem: Tests cover helper and non-streaming conversion, but the streaming chunk accumulator path that feeds final streamed usage has no regression test.
commented.approach: 本轮发 inline comment，要求补一条携带 `usage.prompt_cache_hit_tokens` 的 streaming/chunk 级测试。
commented.design_assessment: Mapping logic本身合理，但核心 streaming 接入点缺少测试闭环。
commented.behavior_impact: 未来 accumulator 退化时现有测试无法发现 DeepSeek streaming cached token 再次归零。
commented.ci_state: 162 checks pass; blocked by test coverage finding.
commented.outcome: xhigh 子审指出 streaming path 未覆盖；主线程确认当前 diff 只有 helper/非流式测试后发 inline comment。

inline_comments.body:
Please add a streaming-path regression test here. The new tests cover the helper and non-streaming conversion, but this accumulator path is the one that feeds streamed DeepSeek usage into the final response; without a chunk-level test carrying `usage.prompt_cache_hit_tokens` through `accumulateChunk` or `applyOpenAISDKTokenDetailsAccumulationFix`, the streaming behavior is still not verified.

<details><summary>中文</summary>
这里是流式路径的新增接入点。当前 PR 覆盖了 helper 和非流式 `completionUsageToModelUsage`，但没有真实经过 streaming accumulator 的回归测试；如果以后这里的 chunk accumulation 退化，现有测试发现不了。请补一条带 `usage.prompt_cache_hit_tokens` 的 streaming/chunk 级测试。
</details>

commented.title: agent/extension: add goal support
commented.author: bytethm
commented.technical_background: Goal extension persists active goal state in session state; `Start` may create a new session or update existing session state.
commented.problem: `Start` treats every `GetSession` error as if the session is missing and falls through to `CreateSession`.
commented.approach: 本轮发 inline comment，要求 non-nil `getErr` 直接返回，只在 `sess == nil` 且无错误时创建 session，并补 fake service 回归测试。
commented.design_assessment: Goal extension主流程可行，但 session persistence 错误不能被吞掉。
commented.behavior_impact: 瞬时后端读取失败时可能错误创建或覆盖 goal state，而不是向调用方暴露持久化失败。
commented.ci_state: 162 checks pass; blocked by session error handling finding.
commented.outcome: xhigh 子审发现 `GetSession` error 被吞；主线程核对 `Start` line 128 和 session service 实现后发 inline comment。

inline_comments.body:
Please do not treat every `GetSession` error as a missing session. Session services can return real backend/read errors here, and this code currently falls through to `CreateSession`, which can create or overwrite goal state instead of surfacing the persistence failure. Return non-nil `getErr`; only call `CreateSession` when `GetSession` succeeds with a nil session, and add a fake-service regression test for that path.

<details><summary>中文</summary>
这里把所有 `GetSession` 错误都当成 session 不存在处理了。session service 可能在这里返回真实的后端/读取错误；当前代码会继续走 `CreateSession`，可能在持久化失败时创建或覆盖 goal state。请在 `getErr != nil` 时直接返回错误，只在 `GetSession` 成功但 `sess == nil` 时创建 session，并补一个 fake service 回归测试。
</details>

Rejects existing type none/local configs instead of keeping legacy aliases.

Please do not treat every `GetSession` error as a missing session. Session services can return real backend/read errors here, and this code currently falls through to `CreateSession`, which can create or overwrite goal state instead of surfacing the persistence failure. Return non-nil `getErr`; only call `CreateSession` when `GetSession` succeeds with a nil session, and add a fake-service regression test for that path.

<details><summary>中文</summary>
这里把所有 `GetSession` 错误都当成 session 不存在处理了。session service 可能在这里返回真实的后端/读取错误；当前代码会继续走 `CreateSession`，可能在持久化失败时创建或覆盖 goal state。请在 `getErr != nil` 时直接返回错误，只在 `GetSession` 成功但 `sess == nil` 时创建 session，并补一个 fake service 回归测试。
</details>

1996.title: fix: DeepSeek cached_tokens always 0 due to missing prompt_cache_hit_…
1996.author: shanghai-Jerry

blockers.summary:
Please add a streaming-path regression test here. The new tests cover the helper and non-streaming conversion, but this accumulator path is the one that feeds streamed DeepSeek usage into the final response; without a chunk-level test carrying `usage.prompt_cache_hit_tokens` through `accumulateChunk` or `applyOpenAISDKTokenDetailsAccumulationFix`, the streaming behavior is still not verified.

<details><summary>中文</summary>
这里是流式路径的新增接入点。当前 PR 覆盖了 helper 和非流式 `completionUsageToModelUsage`，但没有真实经过 streaming accumulator 的回归测试；如果以后这里的 chunk accumulation 退化，现有测试发现不了。请补一条带 `usage.prompt_cache_hit_tokens` 的 streaming/chunk 级测试。
</details>

This overstates both guarantees: `EnqueueSummaryJob` can still fall back to synchronous summary creation when the worker or queue is unavailable, and the session/filterKey serialization is process-local rather than a cross-instance guarantee. Please qualify the non-blocking and duplicate-prevention wording here and mirror the same caveat in the zh doc.

<details><summary>中文</summary>
这里把两个保证说得过强了：当 async worker 或队列不可用时，`EnqueueSummaryJob` 仍可能 fallback 到同步摘要创建；而 session/filterKey 串行化也是进程内保证，不是跨实例保证。请把“不会阻塞输出”和“不会重复昂贵摘要”的表述改成带条件的说明，并同步中文文档。
</details>

Please bump the OTel SDK modules to `v1.41.0` wherever this PR moves the surrounding `go.opentelemetry.io/otel`, `otel/metric`, or `otel/trace` modules to `v1.41.0`. This file still leaves `otel/sdk` on `v1.40.0`, and the same mismatch remains in `examples/go.mod`, `examples/google/go.mod`, `examples/knowledge/go.mod`, `examples/provider/go.mod`, `examples/tailor/go.mod`, `model/provider/go.mod`, `openclaw/go.mod`, `server/evaluation/go.mod`, and `server/promptiter/go.mod`. `runner/bestofn` already fixed the same drift by moving SDK to `v1.41.0`; please apply that consistently. Also align `session/clickhouse/go.mod` by moving `otel/sdk` from `v1.34.0` to the `v1.35.0` release train used by its OTel API modules.

<details><summary>中文</summary>
这些模块本次把 OTel API/metric/trace 升到了 `v1.41.0`，但 SDK 仍停在 `v1.40.0`；`runner/bestofn` 已经按同类问题修到 `v1.41.0`，这里也需要同步，否则依赖更新后仍残留 OpenTelemetry 版本族不一致。另一个同类点是 `session/clickhouse/go.mod`：API/metric/trace 是 `v1.35.0`，SDK 仍是 `v1.34.0`，也需要对齐。
</details>

2022.title: session/mysql: skip schema DDL for pre-existing tables on init
2022.author: hyprh

blockers.summary:
Please do not treat every existing table as operator-provisioned. If a previous bootstrap created the table and then failed while creating a UNIQUE index, the next startup takes this skip path, `verifySchema` only logs the missing index, and the service can run without the uniqueness constraints that session/state writes rely on. Please track/retry incomplete bootstrap tables or make missing UNIQUE indexes fatal for tables created by init.

<details><summary>中文</summary>
这里把“运维预置的完整表”和“上次 init 建表成功但建唯一索引失败留下的半成品表”混在一起了。后者下次启动会跳过索引 DDL，而唯一索引缺失只打 ERROR 日志不阻止启动，可能让 session/app/user state 在缺少唯一约束时继续写入。请让 init 能识别并重试/阻断这种未完成的 bootstrap 状态，或者对 init 创建过的表缺少 UNIQUE index 直接失败。
</details>

2025.title: {evaluation, server/promptiter, examples}: add tool description optimization
2025.author: Flash-LHR
